example.vi: Vâng, tôi sẽ làm điều đó.

definitions.vi: Một từ được sử dụng để diễn đạt sự đồng ý hoặc xác nhận.
definitions.es: Una palabra utilizada para expresar acuerdo o afirmación.
definitions.en: A word used to express agreement or affirmation.

exampleSentences: Vâng, em sẽ giúp anh dọn dẹp phòng khách ngay bây giờ.
Nếu chị cần thêm thông tin, vâng, em có thể gửi email cho chị.
Vâng, anh đồng ý đi xem phim cùng em vào tối nay.
notes_md:
**vâng** = yes (polite). It’s a respectful way to say “yes,” especially to someone older, higher status, or in a formal situation.

It’s usually used alone as a response, or at the beginning of a reply to show respect. Softer and more polite than **ừ** (casual “yeah”).  

In the South, people often say **dạ** instead of **vâng** in everyday speech; in the North, **vâng** is more common.

translation.en: She answered yes when I asked.

content.sentence: Cô ấy đã trả lời ___ khi tôi hỏi.

translation.en: Do you want to go yes?

notes:
vâng = yes (polite). It’s a respectful way to say “yes,” especially to someone older, higher status, or in a formal situation.

It’s usually used alone as a response, or at the beginning of a reply to show respect. Softer and more polite than ừ (casual “yeah”).  

In the South, people often say dạ instead of vâng in everyday speech; in the North, vâng is more common.
exampleSentencesTranslated: Yes, I will help you clean the living room right now.
If you need more information, yes, I can email you.
Yes, I agree to go to the movies with you tonight.
